title: Edited template but changes don't seem to appear
excerpt:
Hello! I made changes to the template I created under my workspace. When I go to make a “New Project” and select the template, I don’t see the changes I made. It’s as if I never made those edits.

posts.author: angwa1900 (Ang)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I made changes to the template I created under my workspace. When I go to make a “New Project” and select the template, I don’t see the changes I made. It’s as if I never made those edits.

Why is it taking so long to update?
